ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. HEARING SET FOR FEB-03-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-03-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218

DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING HEARD ON FEB-03-2009. AFTER HEARING THE TESTIMONY AND CONSIDERING OF THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFAULTED DEFENDANTS (GRANTED PER WRITTEN JUDGMENT). COMMISSIONER WILLIAM GARGANO, CLERK: CARLA CONTRERAS, LOIS JONES CSR (DEPARTMENT 218)

parties.name: RAHABAT, NAEL 4400--17TH ST. SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114

calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: Carla Contreras CSR: Susan Crozier #4761 (Department 218)

Appearances
Plaintiff, Nicola Saba, is present in Pro Per.
Also present, George Nicola Saba, plaintiff's son.

Defendants, Nael Rahabat and Layla Rahabat, are not present.
(Default was entered on 6/3/08 as to the defendants)

This cause came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Nicola Saba and George Nicola Sabais are sworn and examined by the Court.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants, Nael Rahabat and Layla Rahabat, as follows:

Defendants shall pay plaintiff, as and for past due rent, the sum of $20, 377.50, prejudgment interest at the annual rate of 10% in the sum of $2,037.75, and cost in the sum of $535.00 for a total Judgment of $22,950.25. Judgment by Court signed in open court.
